common.tagline: Interior procurement and China sourcing for furniture, lighting and decor

meta.title: Atelier Supply — Interior Procurement & China Sourcing
meta.description: Premium interior procurement: furniture, lighting and decor sourced directly from China's leading factories. A preliminary estimate in minutes; the final quote is manager-reviewed.

common.preliminaryNote: Every amount, line-up and timeline in this report is a preliminary estimate. The final quote is prepared after an Atelier Supply manager reviews the project and selects suppliers.

footer.description: Atelier Supply is a premium interior procurement practice: furniture, lighting and decor sourced directly from China's leading factories — with quality control, logistics and support through to installation.

whyChina.title: Why China sourcing
whyChina.subtitle: The world's leading brands manufacture in China. We work with the same factories — directly, with no intermediaries.

items.title: Factory price, not showroom price
items.text: Direct contracts with manufacturers deliver 30–50% savings versus retail at comparable quality.

items.title: Every quality tier
items.text: From sensible mid-range to factories producing furniture for European luxury houses.

items.title: Made to your project
items.text: Dimensions, materials and finishes are produced to your project — not picked from warehouse stock.

items.title: Quality control on the ground
items.text: Our team in China inspects every batch before shipment: inspections, photo and video reports, packaging control.

homeowners.text: The same calibre of furniture and lighting you find in high-end showrooms — direct from the factories. Selection, verification, purchasing, logistics and customs are on us.

A personal manager at every stage

designers.title: A procurement partner that delivers on site
designers.text: Hand over your specification — receive matched alternatives, prices and timelines. Transparent partner terms and unified paperwork for studios and practices.
points: Full project reporting for your client

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: The essentials on pricing, timelines, quality and guarantees.

contact.title: Shall we discuss your project?
contact.text: Get a preliminary estimate right now — or write to us and a manager will reply within one business day.

items.a: No. The service prepares a preliminary estimate — a guide to budget, line-up and timeline. The final quote is prepared after a manager reviews the project and selects suppliers, and only that quote forms the basis of a contract.

items.q: How much does the preliminary estimate cost?
items.a: It is free and carries no obligations. Commitments begin only once the final quote is agreed and the contract is signed.

items.q: What is the quality of furniture from China?
items.a: We work exclusively with vetted factories — from solid mid-range to facilities producing for European luxury houses. Every batch is inspected before shipment.

items.q: What are the production and delivery timelines?
items.a: Typically 8–16 weeks, depending on the order line-up, production complexity and delivery destination. A timeline guide appears in the preliminary estimate.

items.q: Do you work with designers and architects?
items.a: Yes — it is a dedicated practice: alternatives matched to your specification, partner commission, a single contract and full project reporting.
Before shipment — inspections with photo and video reports. Warranty, cargo insurance and replacement terms are fixed in the contract and the final quote.

projectsPage.title: Our projects
projectsPage.subtitle: Interior procurement delivered with China's factories — from apartments and villas to boutique hotels.
projectsPage.ctaText: Get a preliminary estimate for your project — free, with no obligations.

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.subtitle: The full interior procurement cycle — from selection and production to delivery and placement on site.

items.title: Furniture sourcing from China
items.text: Factory selection, made-to-project production, purchasing and deal management. Case goods and upholstery at every level.

items.title: Lighting and decor procurement
items.text: Chandeliers, floor lamps, textiles, rugs, mirrors and objects from vetted manufacturers.

items.title: Full FF&E procurement
items.text: Complete project supply — furniture, lighting, decor, sanitary ware — as one project with a single owner.

items.title: Alternative selection for design projects
items.text: Alternatives to your specification items with 30–50% savings at comparable quality and materials.

items.title: Logistics and delivery management
items.text: Consolidation at a warehouse in China, insurance, customs clearance and delivery to site.

items.title: Quality control and factory relations
items.text: Pre-shipment inspections, photo and video reports, packaging and schedule control. We negotiate in Chinese.

items.title: For designers and architects
items.text: A partner programme: commission, priority timelines, unified paperwork and reporting for your clients.

servicesPage.ctaText: Start with a preliminary estimate — it maps the line-up, budget and timeline, and a manager will suggest the right format.

processPage.title: How we work
processPage.subtitle: Eight transparent stages — from the first estimate to furniture placed on site.

steps.title: Project or room
steps.text: You share a design project, a specification, or simply photos and room dimensions.

steps.title: Preliminary analysis
steps.text: The service maps the line-up and categories and prepares a budget and timeline guide.

steps.title: Manager review
steps.text: A manager validates the estimate, refines the details and agrees the project scope with you.

steps.title: Supplier sourcing
steps.text: We request factory pricing and gather samples and alternatives for the project's quality tier.

steps.title: Final quote
steps.text: Items, prices, timelines and terms are fixed. Commitments begin only at this stage.

steps.title: Payment and procurement
steps.text: We place orders with the factories and track the production schedule of every item.

steps.title: Quality control
steps.text: Inspections at the factories and the consolidation warehouse, with photo and video reports before shipment.

steps.title: Delivery and placement
steps.text: Customs, delivery to site, and support through acceptance, assembly and placement.

processPage.note: Stages 1–2 are free and carry no obligations. Every figure before the final quote is a preliminary estimate.

aboutPage.title: Atelier Supply
aboutPage.subtitle: Connecting premium interior projects with China's manufacturing capability.
paragraphs: Atelier Supply grew out of high-end interior procurement practice. The same factories make furniture for global brands and for those who know how to work with them directly. We built that direct access — with inspections, contracts and predictable logistics.

Our team works across Russia and China: buyers, quality engineers, logistics specialists and project managers. We speak the language of factories and the language of design projects — and translate between the two without losses.
The service makes the first step transparent: a preliminary estimate in minutes instead of weeks of correspondence. The final quote is always confirmed by the person accountable for the result.

values.title: Honest preliminarity
values.text: We never present an estimate as a quote. Every figure before the final quote is called preliminary — because that is exactly what it is.

values.title: Quality is verified, not promised
values.text: Every batch is inspected before shipment. Photographs, video, measurements — you see what we see.

values.title: One accountable owner
values.text: A project manager guides you from the first estimate to furniture placement — never passed around.
